Introduction

Firstly,web design focuses on template, colors , and fonts to develop the show of the website.Moreover, the company and one person connect easily without facing any type of problem.
DEFINITION:
Digital marketing is refer in which online platform create by businessman,trader for promotes their business and also promotes their product.The concept of digital marketing includes advertisement of their product,promotion of product.Digital market more popular because due to cost-effective,flexible and also provide fast results about their keywords .Digital marketing in patiala provide our opportunities for learning digital marketing skills.
COMPONENTS:
The major components of the digital marketing is SEO,SMM,Content creation, with using this tools helps us more effective,classy,elegant. And also provide good opportunities for sales promotion of their services .SEO(search engines optimization) refers to which optimize or maintain search engines regarding the keywords.SEO helps us to rank higher on search engines platform.

Practical Learning method:
PIIM is practical learning. In addition,students get the option to work on live projects and real-time work. This hands-on helps them know about how online rise works in a real firm’s situation. Moreover, practice allows students to build confidence. While growing problem-solving skills. Therefore,they become job-ready by the time they complete the course.
Skilled Trainers:
Another major reason to choose PIIM is its focus on practical learning. Therefore,students have the energy to work on live projects and gain work skill. In addition, this hands-on practice helps students know how online platforms really work. As a result,they become more confident about their work or job options. Moreover, practice also changes problem-solving skills.
